case_title: COREY PERLMUITTER VS. MURPHY INVESTMENTS, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERLMUITTER, COREY AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY INVESTMENTS, INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY INVESTMENTS, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERLMUITTER, COREY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURPHY INVESTMENTS, INC. $447.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $517.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
